subcodes.first_line: O servant named Karím! Hearken unto the call of the All-Bountiful, as the Countenance of the Ancient of Days hath turned towards thee from this exalted spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد قبل کریم ان استمع ندآء الکریم اذ توجه الیک وجه القدم من هذا المنظر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power of the Manifestation of God
